items.title: Welcome Inkling by Thinking Machines
items.core_innovation: 975B MoE (41B active) open-weight multimodal LLM, 1M context
items.significance: Major open-weights release rivaling closed frontier models

items.title: The SIGReg Objective as Variational Free Energy
items.core_innovation: Links JEPA regularizers to Active Inference free energy
items.significance: Gives normative theoretical grounding for world models

items.title: ExTernD: Expanded-Rank Ternary Decomposition
items.core_innovation: Ternary PTQ factorization with expanded rank error correction
items.significance: Approaches arbitrary quantization accuracy with ternary weights

items.title: Adaptive Filtering of the KV Cache
items.core_innovation: Diagnoses structural-role bias in attention-based KV eviction
items.significance: Fixes degraded eviction on schema-dense long-context inputs

items.title: Accelerating Masked Diffusion Large Language Models: A Survey
items.core_innovation: Surveys caching/reuse techniques enabling dLLM speedups
items.significance: Consolidates path to making diffusion LLMs practically fast

items.title: AVQ-Attention: Adaptive Vector-Quantized Attention
items.core_innovation: Non-uniform codebook capacity allocated by attention mass
items.significance: Improves VQ-attention efficiency for long-context inference

items.title: Saturation Makes Quantization Error Additive
items.significance: Questions core assumption behind mixed-precision methods like HAWQ

items.title: Where Should RL Post-Training Compute Go?
items.core_innovation: Studies fixed-budget tradeoffs: model size vs search vs feedback
items.significance: Practical guidance for allocating scarce RL post-training compute

items.title: Ring-Zero: Scaling Zero RL to a Trillion Parameters
items.core_innovation: Zero RL (no human data) reasoning training at trillion-param scale
items.significance: First large-scale exploration of zero-RL training dynamics

items.title: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Physics
items.core_innovation: Post-trains LLMs with continuous PDE-solver rewards, not prompting
items.significance: Moves PDE code-gen from inference-time tricks to true post-training

items.title: Proxy Exploration and Reusable Guidance (PUST)
items.core_innovation: Decouples exploration from policy via reusable proxy signals
items.significance: Enables async, cross-model reuse of post-training update signals

items.title: Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn't.
items.core_innovation: Practical pitfalls and design lessons for LLM routing systems
items.significance: Directly actionable guidance for production multi-model deployments

items.title: Do AI Agents Know When a Task Is Simple?
items.significance: Addresses agent inefficiency from maximum-context-first strategies

items.title: Claude Sonnet 5 Release (via social coverage)
items.core_innovation: New mid-tier agentic model, 63.2% SWE-bench Pro, cheaper than Opus
items.significance: Strong cost/performance shift for agentic coding deployments

items.title: DFlash Speculative Decoding for llama.cpp
items.core_innovation: Speculative decoding drafts 15 tokens, 2.2x speedup, byte-exact output
items.significance: Practical, lossless inference speedup for local Qwen deployments
